holdings.infoBox: BAMV is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 7.18%, Cisco Systems at 5.42%, Bank of America at 4.98%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.75%, and Cash & Cash Equivalents at 3.35%.

overview.description: The Brookstone Value Stock ETF (BAMV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects US companies with strong value based on external and internal research. It selects both mid- to large-cap stocks. BAMV was launched on Sep 27, 2023 and is issued by Brookstone.
